name: mysql-mcp-server
description: Connect Claude to a MySQL database. Inspect schemas and run read/write queries.
long_description: A local MCP server that connects Claude to a MySQL database over a connection pool. Provides tools to inspect schemas, run SELECT queries, and execute INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE statements.

tools.name: select_mysql_version
tools.description: Returns the connected MySQL server version.

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: Lists all tables in the connected database.

tools.name: describe_table
tools.description: Shows columns, types, and constraints for a given table.

tools.name: query
tools.description: Runs a read-only SELECT query with optional ? placeholder params.

tools.name: mutate
tools.description: Runs an INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE statement with optional params.

db_host.title: Database Host
db_host.description: MySQL server hostname or IP address.

db_name.title: Database Name
db_name.description: Name of the database to connect to.

db_pool_limit.title: Connection Pool Limit
db_pool_limit.description: Maximum number of connections in the pool.
